sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Business Model & Competitive Positioning
required_elements: Payment rail classification and revenue mix breakdown
Total Payable Volume (TPV) growth and take-rate benchmarking
Competitive moat assessment (network effects, regulatory licenses, switching costs)
Geographic and vertical revenue concentration analysis

sections.title: Take-Rate & Unit Economics Bridge
required_elements: Take-rate trend analysis and compression drivers
Net Revenue Retention (NRR) and customer expansion metrics
Gross margin bridge and credit loss modeling
Rule of 40 efficiency analysis vs. peers

sections.title: Regulatory & Compliance Moat
required_elements: License inventory and CFPB oversight risk assessment
Basel III and bank charter capital requirement analysis
Interchange regulation and revenue impact modeling
Crypto/stablecoin exposure and policy risk quantification

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/TPV multiple benchmarking and justification
Adjusted EBITDA and FCF margin progression modeling
SaaS/platform component EV/Revenue application
Credit risk premium and leverage-adjusted WACC for BNPL/lending

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Merchant concentration and churn risk monitoring
Credit deterioration and charge-off trend tracking
Regulatory/legal overhang and settlement risk quantification
Crypto and FX exposure impact on reported results

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Take-rate resilience under volume and competitive pressure analysis
Profitability pathway and capital intensity modeling
Regulatory moat durability and API commoditization risk assessment
